name: owen
description: Institution-private lecture-to-approved-study-artifact workflow for medical education

scripts.build: npm run build:prompts && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.jsonc --env=""
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build:prompts && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env=""
scripts.dev: npm run build:prompts && wrangler dev --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.start: npm run build:prompts && wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --env=""
scripts.test: npm run build:prompts && node --experimental-strip-types --loader ./scripts/ts-loader.mjs --test $(find tests -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.js' \) | sort)
scripts.test:parity: npm run build:prompts && node --experimental-strip-types --loader ./scripts/ts-loader.mjs --test $(find tests/runtime/parity -type f \( -name '*.test.ts' -o -name '*.test.js' \) | sort)
